title: One HP Phantoms
description: Makes all Phantoms have 1 HP, so they can be easily killed with a single punch, or thorns armor.
body:
Makes all Phantoms have 1 HP, so they can be easily killed with a single punch, or thorns armor.

# Config
HP can be modified in `config/onehpphantoms.json` to set a different default HP (between 0 and 20).

| Setting | Default | Description |
| ------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `hp` | `1` | The default HP for Phantoms to spawn with. |
